response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON song ('許婚っきゅん'). 2. The Reference JSON contained only partial lyrics for the song; I have transcribed the missing lyrics and the subsequent talk/merchandise segments from the audio. 3. No leftover lyrics were discarded as the video covers the full performance and subsequent dialogue. 4. Subtitles are tightly synchronized to vocal bursts with precise millisecond timestamps, ensuring no cross-pause merging or early cutoffs.

subtitles.original: どいつもこいつもなんだかやっぱノーテンキ
subtitles.english: Everyone around seems so carefree,

subtitles.original: 気になるあの娘も悩みはきっとあるでしょ？
subtitles.english: But still, that girl I’m interested in has her own troubles, right?

subtitles.original: ざっくり半端な憂鬱ともあふれ同じ
subtitles.english: A bunch of miscellaneous and depressed melancholy people

subtitles.original: 頭の中はぐちゃぐちゃさ
subtitles.english: My head is all jumbled up

subtitles.original: どんまい平気だい 意気地がないの放っておいてイージー
subtitles.english: Don't worry, it's fine, leave my spinelessness alone, it's easy

subtitles.original: いけないいけない事柄なんてないから
subtitles.english: Because there's no such thing as things you shouldn't do

subtitles.original: 嫌刺す じゃんけんぽんで さあおゆき
subtitles.english: Hateful stabs, rock-paper-scissors, now go forth

subtitles.original: うじうじ爆弾で 産み出されてく
subtitles.english: Born from a hesitating bomb

subtitles.original: 君はもうハイスピードだな
subtitles.english: You're already at high speed

subtitles.original: お前も同感 おあつらえ
subtitles.english: You agree too, it's just right

subtitles.original: はっちゃけ めっちゃくなドラマ
subtitles.english: A wild and crazy drama

subtitles.original: ドラが鳴るよ
subtitles.english: The gong rings

subtitles.original: い・い・許婚っきゅん I Love You なのだ
subtitles.english: I-I-Fiancé-Kyun, I love you, that's what it is

subtitles.original: 四六時中 愛をちょうだい
subtitles.english: I want love all the time

subtitles.original: い・い・い・いちかばちきゅん
subtitles.english: I-I-I-Take-a-chance-Kyun

subtitles.original: 愛、愛、愛は無敵 二分の一じゃ物足りない
subtitles.english: Love, love, love is invincible, 1/2 isn't enough

subtitles.original: それでも結局見えないあいつの胸の内
subtitles.english: But in the end, I still can't see into his heart

subtitles.original: 惜しまれさだめ 浮気通りもいらないから
subtitles.english: I don't need a regretted fate or infidelity

subtitles.original: 先輩後輩ヤンキーちゃんきー関係ない
subtitles.english: Seniors, juniors, punks, it doesn't matter

subtitles.original: いざ尋常に勝負
subtitles.english: Now, let's have a fair fight

subtitles.original: 君がもしも その気なら
subtitles.english: If you're up for it

subtitles.original: ボイミーツガールが始まりそうならさあ
subtitles.english: If it looks like a boy-meets-girl is about to start, then go

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ技 繰り出す
subtitles.english: Unleashing a technique not yet seen

subtitles.original: 僕ら 手強い スイートだな
subtitles.english: We're tough and sweet

subtitles.original: お前も同感 おあつらえ
subtitles.english: You agree too, it's just right

subtitles.original: へっちゃら呉れない 修羅場
subtitles.english: A scene that doesn't care

subtitles.original: ドラが鳴るよ
subtitles.english: The gong rings

subtitles.original: 意味深な内容 あいまいな愛より直行
subtitles.english: Suggestive content, straight to it rather than vague love

subtitles.original: 四の五の言わず さしてちょうだい
subtitles.english: Stop complaining and just point it out

subtitles.original: 待って！ 1ピコまで全集中 話望まず
subtitles.english: Wait! Concentrate fully down to 1 pico, don't want to talk

subtitles.original: 自分の意思はどんなもんじゃい
subtitles.english: What's your own will like?

subtitles.original: い・い・許婚っきゅん I Love You なのだ
subtitles.english: I-I-Fiancé-Kyun, I love you, that's what it is

subtitles.original: 四六時中 愛をちょうだい
subtitles.english: I want love all the time

subtitles.original: い・い・いちかばちきゅん 愛、愛、愛は無敵
subtitles.english: I-I-Take-a-chance-Kyun, love, love, love is invincible

subtitles.original: 二分の一じゃ物足りない
subtitles.english: 1/2 isn't enough

subtitles.original: こんなんじゃ知らない 会いたいかも知れない
subtitles.english: I don't know if it's like this, I might want to see you

subtitles.original: 毎晩期待 1000回じゃ足りないや
subtitles.english: Expecting every night, 1000 times isn't enough

subtitles.original: 偶然絶後 兵士占う
subtitles.english: Unprecedented coincidence, soldier fortune-telling

subtitles.original: 変愛無常 めっちゃ回転
subtitles.english: Weird love, inconstant, rotating like crazy

subtitles.original: はい、というわけで、許婚っきゅんでしたー！どうでしたかー？
subtitles.english: Alright, so that was 'Iinazukkyun'! How was it?

subtitles.original: え、シルエットのさ、ここかっこよくなかった？
subtitles.english: Hey, wasn't this silhouette part cool?

subtitles.original: ボン、ボンってしてんの
subtitles.english: Going boom, boom like that.

subtitles.original: 結構お気に入りポイントです
subtitles.english: It's one of my favorite parts.

subtitles.original: はい、どうだった？
subtitles.english: So, how did you like it?

subtitles.original: 可愛いでしょ、改めて新衣装
subtitles.english: Isn't the new outfit cute?

subtitles.original: ねー、ミドりともポルちゃんともね、歌えて嬉しい
subtitles.english: Yeah, I'm happy I could sing with Midori and Polka-chan.

subtitles.original: まさかの「えー」って思ってる人がね、めっちゃ多かったと思うんだけど
subtitles.english: I think many people were like "What?!", but...

subtitles.original: お呼びしました、今回は
subtitles.english: I invited them this time.

subtitles.original: 嬉しいです
subtitles.english: I'm so happy.

subtitles.original: さあ、というわけで
subtitles.english: Now then...

subtitles.original: 結構歌ったね
subtitles.english: I've sung quite a lot.

subtitles.original: なんかそろそろウズウズしてる人たちがいっぱいいる気がするなー
subtitles.english: I feel like there are a lot of people getting restless soon.

subtitles.original: ウズ、ウズ、ウズ、ウズ、ウズ...
subtitles.english: Restless, restless, restless...

subtitles.original: 僕が一番ウズウズしてる
subtitles.english: I'm the one who's most restless.

subtitles.original: はい、というわけで、待てができないので、ご紹介したいと思います
subtitles.english: So, since I can't wait anymore, I'd like to introduce...

subtitles.original: 誕生日といえば...
subtitles.english: Speaking of birthdays...

subtitles.original: 誕生日グッズ！
subtitles.english: Birthday Merchandise!

subtitles.original: 今回の誕生日グッズはこちら！
subtitles.english: Here is this time's birthday merchandise!

subtitles.original: はい、久々にタペストリーを出します
subtitles.english: Yes, I'm releasing a tapestry after a long time.

subtitles.original: まず一つ目、B2タペストリー！
subtitles.english: First one, B2 Tapestry!

subtitles.original: こちらイラストはね、とってもクールな僕なんですけれども
subtitles.english: This illustration is a very cool version of me,

subtitles.original: しゃがむ先生に描いていただきました
subtitles.english: drawn by Syagamu-sensei.

subtitles.original: え、あ、これ「龍」違いとかやめてね
subtitles.english: Hey, don't confuse the 'Dragon' or anything.

subtitles.original: 龍！お前も好きだし
subtitles.english: Dragon! I like you too,

subtitles.original: お前も好きだぞ、みんな愛してる、龍です
subtitles.english: and you too. I love you all. It's a Dragon.

subtitles.original: めっちゃかっこいいよね
subtitles.english: It's really cool, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 強そうな龍と強そうな僕、かっこいいでしょ
subtitles.english: A strong-looking dragon and a strong-looking me. Cool, right?

subtitles.original: そして二つ目は...
subtitles.english: And the second one is...

subtitles.original: なんとお腹いっぱい食べちゃう餃子皿！
subtitles.english: A 'eat your fill' dumpling plate!

subtitles.original: なんとこちらロボ子先生が書いてくれました
subtitles.english: Actually, Roboco-sensei drew this!

subtitles.original: 見て、なんかすごいいい...
subtitles.english: Look, it's really good...
